member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.License.Verification.KeyVerificator.VerifyKey(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a key is valid as well as all of its segments.
member.returns: True if the key is valid; false otherwise.

member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.License.Verification.KeyVerificator.ValidKey(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if inputted key is valid
member.returns: True if valid, false if invalid.

member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.License.Verification.KeyVerificator.ValidateSegment(System.String)
member.returns: True if valid, false if invalid.
